Talent Acquisition Specialist

Hi Job Seekers, 
We are Hiring for Senior GenAI Consultant/ Data Scientist - Remote

Job Title: Senior GenAI Consultant/ Data Scientist
Location: Remote – India (Supporting US Time Zone)
Job Type: Long Term Contract 
Shift: Night Shift (US Time Zone)
Must have 8+years of experience 

Need Senior GenAI Consultant/ Data Scientist to lead the design and implementation of AI-driven QA automation solutions, with a strong focus on agentic AI frameworks for test case generation, optimization, and self-healing automation.
 
The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Generative AI, Machine Learning, and Test Automation, and a proven track record of designing and deploying agent-based AI systems that improve testing efficiency, coverage, and ROI.
 
Design and implement Generative AI solutions for QA, including:
- Automated test case generation from requirements/user stories
- Test optimization and redundancy reduction
- Intelligent defect prediction and root cause analysis
 
Architect and deploy agentic AI systems for QA automation:
- Multi-agent orchestration (planner, executor, validator agents)
- Autonomous test execution and self-healing capabilities
 
- Build, fine-tune, and deploy LLMs and ML models for QA use cases
 
- Proven experience applying AI/ML in QA automation and Test case generation/optimization
- Hands-on experience with Large Language Models (LLMs)


Thanks & Regards
Ragul Selvaraju

🚀 Hiring: Data Scientist – Generative AI & Machine Learning
📍 Location: Remote (India Only)
⏳ Experience: 8+ Years
💼 Employment Type: Contract

We are looking for a highly skilled Data Scientist specializing in Generative AI & Machine Learning to design, develop, and deploy advanced ML models and scalable AI solutions.

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
	•	Design, develop, train, and deploy ML & Generative AI models
	•	Perform advanced data analysis to identify trends & insights
	•	Translate complex analytics into actionable business recommendations
	•	Build and optimize end-to-end ML pipelines
	•	Work with structured & unstructured datasets
	•	Evaluate and improve model performance
	•	Collaborate with cross-functional teams
	•	Document workflows, experiments, and model performance

🔹 Required Skills:
	•	8+ years in Machine Learning & Generative AI
	•	Strong background in data analysis & statistical techniques
	•	Hands-on experience with ML model development & deployment
	•	Expertise in data science tools & frameworks
	•	Strong problem-solving & communication skills

📌 Note: Candidates must be based in India only

📩 Please reach out to me at +919899634637 or jbhatia@forcecraver.com to discuss further.
🔔 Follow @Jitender Bhatia @Forcecraver Technologies for more job updates.
